cashback_transactions_active_unique.name: cashback_transactions_active_unique
cashback_transactions_active_unique.where: invoice_number IS NOT NULL AND status != 'cancelled'

deal_answers_single_answer_check.name: deal_answers_single_answer_check
deal_answers_single_answer_check.value:
("deal_answers"."answer_boolean" IS NOT NULL)::int + 
      ("deal_answers"."answer_number" IS NOT NULL)::int + 
      ("deal_answers"."answer_text" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

deal_questions_options_check.name: deal_questions_options_check
deal_questions_options_check.value:
("deal_questions"."question_type" IN ('select', 'multiselect') AND array_length("deal_questions"."options", 1) > 0) 
      OR 
      ("deal_questions"."question_type" NOT IN ('select', 'multiselect'))
